events.title: ws-skill-evolution

params.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -u

PYTHON=~/.local/bin/python3
CLI=~/workshop/stations/skill-evolver/cli/skill_evolver.py
LOG=~/workshop/outputs/skill-evolver/logs

mkdir -p "$LOG"

DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
"$PYTHON" "$CLI" run --json > "$LOG/evolution-${DATE}.log" 2>&1
EXIT=$?

if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "Evolution run failed with exit code $EXIT"
fi

exit 0

events.notes: Nightly skill evolution — AutoResearch-inspired keep/discard optimization loop
